corpus.font_exclusion_policy: exclude ESC command components, C0/C1 controls, and game PUA icons from G1N raster demand

sources.source: Korean names in the source-free public msgdata castle-name overlay
Korean text in the source-free public msgev dialogue overlay
Korean names in the source-free public msgev officer overlay
buildable ko strings in msgui catalog v2

font_provenance.family: Noto Sans KR / Noto Serif KR
font_provenance.raster_method: raster-v2-compatible 2x scratch GDI+ raster, complete ink extraction, unscaled centered 4bpp copy

payload_policy.binary_payload_origin: OFL Noto Korean glyph pixels rasterized from pinned fonts
payload_policy.structural_payload: per-table map writes and generated 12-byte records for ordinal-0 demanded glyphs; stock palettes, old maps, old records, and stock atlas are absent

release_blocker: font-v6 candidate requires in-game SC runtime render/exit validation before release eligibility
